fixes.origin:
cmd = _compose(tool, value)
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
allowed = {
    "ping": (True, ["ping", "-c", "1"]),
    "nslookup": (True, ["nslookup"]),
    "whoami": (False, ["whoami"])
}
entry = allowed.get(tool)
if entry is None:
    raise ValueError("Unsupported tool")
needs_arg, base = entry
argv = base + ([value] if needs_arg else [])
proc = subprocess.run(argv, shell=False, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
